name: Shrimp with Pistachio Pesto Pasta
method: In a blender, add garlic, parmesan, toasted pistachio nuts, olive oil, basil, salt, and pepper. Blend well, scoop out into a bowl and let sit covered with plastic wrap in the refrigerator for an hour so the flavors can blend. Boil salted water for pasta. In the meantime, in a large frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T butter and 1 T olive oil, add uncooked shrimp, salt, and pepper. Sauté for about 2 minutes, or just long enough for the shrimp to cook but make sure you don't overdo it, shrimp cooks fast and gets rubbery if you cook it too long. It will turn white when cooked. Turn off heat. When your salted water is boiling add fresh fettuccine and cook until al dente. It only takes about 3-4 minutes so stand there and keep an eye on it. Turn on heat to medium and add cooked fettucine directly to shrimp with tongs, and then add your prepared pesto and 1 ladle of pasta water. Mix, mix, mix, until a sauce forms, you can add more pasta water if the sauce is too thick. Add minced garlic and sauté for one minute, then turn off the heat. Manticare and garnish with fresh dill. Serves 2-3. Olé
